data.title: French 10-Year Bond Yield Experiences Significant Drop
data.description: French 10-year government bond yields fell by 5 basis points during the day, marking the largest decline since October of last year. According to Odaily, this drop reflects a notable shift in the bond market. The decrease in yield indicates changing investor sentiment and economic conditions in France.

data.title: Liquid Capital Founder Discusses Market Volatility and Investment Strategy
data.description:
On January 26, Liquid Capital founder Yi Lihua shared insights on social media regarding recent market fluctuations. According to BlockBeats, Yi noted that the market has experienced significant volatility, with bearish forces reaching their peak. Despite this, he remains confident in the overall bullish trend, supported by the strong performance of U.S. stocks and the country's crypto strategy.

Yi emphasized that their investment strategy remains unchanged, citing a previous investment in Ethereum that yielded a return of nearly 2.5 times. He acknowledged the price correction from $2800 to $2100 due to a Middle Eastern black swan event, but considers such fluctuations within a normal range. Yi humorously remarked on the rollercoaster-like state of being a bull in the current market, where values can swing by millions overnight.

He expressed that greater challenges often lead to higher rewards, and acknowledged that investment is never a guaranteed profit. Yi stated that their ongoing strategy involves accumulating more Ethereum during dips. He also mentioned that recent safe-haven investments have been directed towards gold and silver, but anticipates a moment when profits will be taken and funds will return to the crypto sector. Yi concluded with optimism, asserting that the crypto industry's lowest point will eventually pass.

data.title: Ripple’s XRP 13-Month Support Tested: Will the ‘Massive Rally’ Finally Happen?
data.description:
XRP holds $1. 80 support as analysts point to a potential breakout toward $2. 70 amid ETF outflows and rising exchange reserves.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/ripples-xrp-13-month-support-tested-will-the-massive-rally-finally-happen/

data.title: Gold Surges Amid Geopolitical Tensions, Bitcoin Struggles as Safe Haven
data.description:
Gold prices have surged sharply, surpassing $5,100 an ounce, driven by geopolitical tensions, policy unpredictability, and increased central bank purchases. According to NS3.AI, Bitcoin, in contrast, is lagging as a safe haven, with outflows from ETFs and a volatility premium in options indicating risk rather than protection.

The article highlights four critical changes needed for Bitcoin to attain a status similar to gold as a haven asset. Additionally, it explores three potential scenarios for the evolving relationship between Bitcoin and gold.

data.title: Upbit has listed Solare (SXP) as a transaction requiring caution and has suspended deposit services.
data.description: According to official sources, Upbit, South Korea's largest centralized exchange (CEX), announced that Solare (SXP) has been designated as a cautionary trading item by member companies of the Digital Asset Exchange Alliance (DAXA), and SXP deposit services on Upbit have been suspended. After being designated as a cautionary trading item, Upbit typically conducts a detailed review of the digital asset to determine whether to extend, remove, or ultimately terminate trading support.

data.title: Bitget and Tread.fi deepen their partnership to improve cross-market trading efficiency under the UEX architecture.
data.description: Bitget announced a deepened partnership with Tread.fi, a decentralized trading infrastructure protocol focused on automated execution and cross-market connectivity. This collaboration combines Bitget's Unified Exchange (UEX) architecture with Tread.fi's modular on-chain trading framework, aiming to expand users' access to, execution of, and management of trades in both centralized and decentralized environments. Bitget CEO Gracy Chen stated that as trading models increasingly evolve towards automation and strategy, effectively connecting decentralized execution capabilities with centralized liquidity has become a key direction. This upgraded partnership reflects Bitget's long-term direction of building a universal exchange, enabling users to improve trading efficiency on a unified platform.

data.title: Gate fully supports trading of precious metal tokens such as XAUT and PAXG (gold), as well as stock tokens such as NVDA and TSLA, through ETFs, instant exchanges, trading bots, leveraged trading, wealth management, and dollar-cost averaging.
data.description: According to official sources, Gate.com's instant swap and trading bots now fully support all listed stock tokens and precious metal tokens, further enhancing the efficiency and flexibility of multi-asset trading. Simultaneously, Gate.com's leverage, wealth management, and dollar-cost averaging services have opened up leveraged trading, spot wealth management, and dollar-cost averaging for some stock tokens, XAUT (gold), and PAXG (gold). Gate.com's ETF will also gradually launch spot ETF products for some stock tokens and precious metals, continuously enriching derivatives trading options. The Gate.com stock token zone has launched perpetual contract trading for JPMUSDT, BABAUSDT, and ACNUSDT (USDT settlement), all supporting 1-10x leverage. Gate.com's Perp DEX is also now available. Furthermore, Gate.com's ETF, instant swap, trading bots, leverage, wealth management, and dollar-cost averaging services will comprehensively cover precious metal tokens such as XAUT and PAXG, as well as mainstream stock tokens such as NVDA and TSLA, helping users to access a global multi-asset market in one stop.

data.title: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group Reports Holdings in MicroStrategy
data.description: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group has disclosed its ownership of 606,629 shares in MicroStrategy, according to PANews. The financial institution estimates the market value of these shares to be approximately $96.6 million, based on the current stock price. MicroStrategy, now known as Strategy, is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol MSTR.

data.title: Virtune Launches BNB Exchange-Traded Product on Nasdaq Stockholm
data.description: Virtune, a regulated crypto asset management company in Sweden, has introduced a new cryptocurrency exchange-traded product (ETP) on Nasdaq Stockholm. According to Foresight News, the Virtune BNB ETP is a physically-backed product designed to offer investors a secure and cost-effective way to invest in BNB. The product provides a 1:1 exposure to BNB with an annual management fee of 1.95%, fully backed by physical BNB. It trades under the code VIRBNB and is denominated in Swedish Krona.

data.title: Golden FI Secures $2 Million in Seed Funding for RWA Digital Infrastructure
data.description:
Golden FI, a digital infrastructure platform for Web3 real-world assets (RWA), has announced the successful completion of a $2 million seed funding round. According to ChainCatcher, the round was led by strategic partner Golden Chain Capital, with participation from four other globally recognized investment institutions specializing in Web3 and fintech. The identities of these additional investors remain undisclosed for strategic reasons.

Golden FI is focused on developing a secure, transparent, and compliant protocol for bringing RWA onto the blockchain, aiming to bridge the gap between traditional financial assets and decentralized finance (DeFi). The funds raised will primarily be used to accelerate the development of its underlying technology architecture, enhance compliance systems across multiple global jurisdictions, and expand partnerships with high-quality real-world asset suppliers worldwide.

Positioned as an emerging force in the RWA sector, Golden FI is rapidly becoming a crucial link between real-world value and the crypto ecosystem, supported by Golden Link's strategic backing and innovative asset mapping technology.

data.title: Sei Labs Co-Founder to Attend Hong Kong Forum on Industry Trends
data.description:
Sei Labs Co-Founder Jayendra Jog is set to attend the 'Build and Scale in 2026' forum in Hong Kong on February 10. According to ChainCatcher, the event is co-hosted by ChainCatcher, RootData, and Alibaba Cloud, and is a significant part of the Consensus HongKong conference.

Sei Labs develops open-source technology for the high-performance Layer 1 blockchain, Sei Network. The network's unique optimizations enable Web3 applications to achieve Web2-level scalability and performance, facilitating the widespread adoption of digital assets. The forum will focus on industry integration trends, growth paths, and market opportunities in the new cycle, with in-depth discussions on key areas such as RWA, stablecoins, AI, payments, and DeFi.

The event aims to bring together global project leaders, investment institutions, and developers to build a high-value industry network and explore future opportunities and potential in the Web3 ecosystem.

data.title: Bitcoin Hashrate Plunges as Arctic Blast Hits U.S. Grids
data.description:
A powerful winter storm sweeping across the United States has triggered one of the sharpest short-term Bitcoin (BTC) hashrate drops in recent years.   Roughly 200 exahashes per second (EH/s) have gone offline, slowing Bitcoin block production to about 12 minutes. The event is offering a real-time stress test of how Bitcoin mining now interacts with […] The post Bitcoin Hashrate Plunges as Arctic Blast Hits U. S
source: https://www.techgaged.com/bitcoin-hashrate-plunges-as-arctic-blast-hits-u-s-grids/

data.title: Nvidia H20 and H200 help power AI model trained entirely on Chinese synthetic datasets
data.description:
Tsinghua and Microsoft trained a full AI coding model using only synthetic data, with no real-world inputs at any stage.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/nvidia-h20-h200-chinese-synthetic-datasets/

data.title: Former Bank Manager Pleads Guilty to Embezzlement Charges
data.description: Krista Murr, a former regional sales manager at Orrstown Bank in Pennsylvania, has admitted to embezzling $84,573 from a customer account over a period of nearly five years. According to NS3.AI, Murr has been prohibited from working in the finance industry and is required to pay restitution. Orrstown Bank, which holds $5.4 billion in assets and is ranked 226th in the United States, identified Murr's actions as breaches of safe banking practices.

data.title: Solana Foundation Introduces New PropAMM Mechanism to Enhance Trading Efficiency
data.description:
Solana Foundation has unveiled its latest proprietary automated market maker (PropAMM) mechanism aimed at improving trading efficiency between decentralized exchanges (DEX) and centralized exchanges (CEX). According to Foresight News, unlike traditional centralized market makers, PropAMM employs a hybrid approach that uses offline predictive price models to push minimal price data on-chain and utilizes smart contract logic for real-time quote calculations. This method combines the efficiency of CEX with the settlement advantages of DEX.

PropAMM is capable of dynamic quoting, providing deep liquidity for regular users while preventing outdated price arbitrage. The information provided indicates that PropAMM offers 99% of the efficiency of CEX at a significantly lower cost than traditional models.

data.title: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group, Japan's fifth-largest bank, disclosed that it holds $96.6 million worth of Strategy shares.
data.description: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust Group, Japan's fifth-largest bank with assets of $633 billion, holds 606,629 shares of Strategy (MSTR), worth approximately $96.6 million. (BitcoinTreasuries.NET)

data.title: ING: Silver's strong rebound continues
data.description: Ewa Manthey, a commodities strategist at ING, pointed out that silver's strong break above $110 was mainly due to continued safe-haven inflows and robust industrial demand. A weaker dollar, declining real yields, and increased policy uncertainty have all boosted investor demand for hard assets, supporting silver prices. Furthermore, a historic short squeeze and strong retail buying also contributed to the price increase. Meanwhile, industrial demand—particularly from investments in solar, electrification, and grid infrastructure—has led to tight supply in the spot market, while mineral supply growth remains limited. Despite these risks, the overall situation remains favorable. Strong industrial demand, tight spot supply, and strong investor interest will continue to support the market. (Jinshi)

data.title: Gate launches its 71st Contract Points Airdrop, with each account earning approximately $25.
data.description: On-chain data shows that the 71st Gate.com USDT airdrop event is underway. The single-account reward for this airdrop is approximately $25. It is understood that this airdrop is divided into two prize pools: users holding ≥ 40 Gate.com points can receive a 100 USDT position trial voucher, consuming 20 Gate.com points; users holding ≥ 140 Gate.com points can receive 25 USDT, consuming 15 Gate.com points. The 72nd Gate.com USDT airdrop, offering 20 FIL & 100 USDT position trial vouchers per person, will begin on January 27th at 18:00 (UTC+8). Join now for a chance to claim rewards tomorrow.
